## What this PR does

Closes #

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo deny check` passes (no new disallowed licenses or banned crates)
- [ ] If UI changed: before/after screenshot or screencap attached
- [ ] If user-facing: `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Branch is rebased on `main` (no merge commits)

<!-- Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, follow-up issues, things you'd
